prompt: An anime-style illustration of a {argument name="character description" default="young woman with long dark hair wearing a dark jacket"} sitting on a rocky cliff edge, facing away to admire a vibrant {argument name="time of day" default="sunset"}. To the right stands a {argument name="architectural element" default="red torii gate and two glowing stone lanterns"}. The foreground features scattered {argument name="foliage" default="red maple leaves"}. Below stretches a vast mountainous landscape with a distant lake and a peak resembling Mt. Fuji. The sky is a breathtaking gradient of deep blue, purple, pink, and orange, detailed with clouds, stars, and {argument name="sky detail" default="two shooting stars"}. Highly detailed, cinematic anime background art.
translatedPrompt: 动漫风格插画，画面主体为 {argument name="character description" default="一位留着黑色长发、背对镜头坐在岩石峭壁上的年轻女性"}，俯瞰着 {argument name="landscape" default="连绵起伏的山脉、蜿蜒的河流与云雾"}。前景包含 {argument name="foliage type" default="鲜艳的红色秋季枫叶"} 以及 {argument name="architectural elements" default="一座传统的日本鸟居和发光的石灯笼"}。场景由 {argument name="sky description" default="从绚丽的粉橙色日落过渡到深蓝色星空并伴有流星"} 的天空照亮。电影级光影，极具细节的场景氛围。

breakdown.creativeCore: 动漫风格秋日山间日落：生成一幅令人惊叹的动漫风格风景画，画面中包含一位角色在日落时分俯瞰山峦，并融入了传统日本元素。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, anime]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
